Body.Content:
Browse your company’s approved logos, icons, and photos right inside PowerPoint—no need to search elsewhere. Stay on brand and compliant with easy access to your organization’s asset library and connected image sources.

GA date: October CY2025

GA date: October CY2025

message.Title: PowerPoint: Find and add company approved images with Brand Images.
